name: Lead intake to CRM upsert pattern
purpose: Capture a lead from a form, email, or ad platform, normalize contact data, and create or update CRM records.
steps: Normalize phone, email, name, and language-specific fields
Lookup CRM account/contact by external lead id, phone, or email
Create account/contact when no match exists
Write audit log with source event id
Route incomplete or low-confidence records to manual review
